case_title: CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORP. vs. NEWHOUSE, MARIAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT NEWHOUSE, MARIAN DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORP. SERVED JUN-30-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEWHOUSE, MARIAN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT NEWHOUSE, MARIAN
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWHOUSE, MARIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 385 EDDY ST #612, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $3.46 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORP.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NEWHOUSE, MARIAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT NEWHOUSE, MARIAN
